query:
UPDATE atolls SET
  overview = CASE 
    WHEN name = 'Raa Atoll' THEN 'Raa Atoll is a pristine diving destination featuring world-class dive sites with abundant marine life including manta rays, pelagics, and sharks. Known for excellent current dives along walls and pinnacles, Raa offers an exclusive experience with fewer tourists than other northern atolls. The atoll combines luxury resorts with authentic local island culture.'
    WHEN name = 'Lhaviyani Atoll' THEN 'Lhaviyani Atoll is renowned for its clear lagoons and calm waters, making it ideal for snorkeling and diving. The atoll is particularly popular with honeymooners seeking pristine beaches and romantic settings. With a mix of luxury resorts and local islands, Lhaviyani offers diverse experiences from adventure to relaxation.'
    WHEN name = 'Noonu Atoll' THEN 'Noonu Atoll offers exciting drift dives along walls and pinnacles with a variety of shark encounters and unique reef and macro species. The atoll is known for its pristine coral ecosystems and abundant marine biodiversity. Home to several luxury resorts and local islands, Noonu provides excellent diving combined with comfortable accommodations.'
    WHEN name = 'Shaviyani Atoll' THEN 'Shaviyani Atoll is a remote northern destination offering pristine diving and snorkeling in less crowded waters. The atoll features healthy coral reefs, abundant marine life, and a mix of luxury resorts and local islands. Known for excellent value and authentic experiences, Shaviyani attracts divers seeking pristine conditions.'
    WHEN name = 'Haa Alifu Atoll' THEN 'Haa Alifu Atoll is the northernmost atoll of the Maldives, located about 350 km north of Malé. This remote destination offers pristine natural beauty, authentic local culture, and excellent diving opportunities. The atoll is known for its untouched coral reefs and abundant marine life, making it ideal for adventurous travelers seeking exclusive experiences.'
    WHEN name = 'Haa Dhaalu Atoll' THEN 'Haa Dhaalu Atoll is a remote destination featuring pristine coral reefs, authentic local culture, and luxury resorts without crowds. The atoll offers excellent diving and snorkeling combined with peaceful island experiences. Known for its unspoiled natural beauty and genuine Maldivian hospitality, Haa Dhaalu is ideal for travelers seeking exclusive, authentic experiences.'
    WHEN name = 'Dhaalu Atoll' THEN 'Dhaalu Atoll provides excellent value tourism with authentic local island experiences and beautiful natural environments. This atoll offers budget travelers the chance to experience true Maldivian culture without resort price tags. Local islands feature traditional architecture, working fishing harbors, and opportunities to learn about sustainable island living.'
    WHEN name = 'Faafu Atoll' THEN 'Faafu Atoll is a remote central destination offering pristine diving and snorkeling combined with authentic local island experiences. The atoll features healthy coral reefs, abundant marine life, and a mix of luxury resorts and budget-friendly local islands. Known for excellent value and genuine Maldivian hospitality, Faafu attracts diverse travelers.'
    WHEN name = 'Vaavu Atoll' THEN 'Vaavu Atoll is a small, remote atoll offering pristine diving and snorkeling experiences with fewer tourists. The atoll features excellent dive sites, healthy coral ecosystems, and a mix of luxury resorts and local islands. Known for its untouched natural beauty and exclusive experiences, Vaavu is ideal for divers seeking pristine conditions.'
    WHEN name = 'Thaa Atoll' THEN 'Thaa Atoll is a remote southern destination offering pristine diving and authentic local island experiences. The atoll features healthy coral reefs, abundant marine life, and a mix of luxury resorts and budget-friendly local islands. Known for excellent value and genuine Maldivian hospitality, Thaa attracts adventurous travelers seeking exclusive experiences.'
    ELSE overview
  END,
  highlights = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Raa Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Manta Ray Hotspot', 'description', 'Seasonal aggregations of manta rays at cleaning stations'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Pristine Dive Sites', 'description', 'Thilas, channels, and walls with excellent visibility'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Exclusive Destination', 'description', 'Less crowded than other northern atolls'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Local Island Culture', 'description', 'Authentic Maldivian experiences on local islands')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Lhaviyani Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Clear Lagoons', 'description', 'Calm, transparent waters perfect for snorkeling'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Honeymooner Paradise', 'description', 'Romantic settings and luxury resorts'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Diverse Diving', 'description', 'Varied dive sites suitable for all levels'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Local Islands', 'description', 'Authentic cultural experiences')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Noonu Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Drift Diving', 'description', 'Exciting current dives along walls and pinnacles'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Shark Encounters', 'description', 'Regular sightings of reef sharks and pelagics'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Pristine Reefs', 'description', 'Healthy coral ecosystems with exceptional biodiversity'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Luxury Resorts', 'description', 'World-class accommodation options')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Shaviyani Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Pristine Diving', 'description', 'Less crowded dive sites with excellent conditions'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Healthy Reefs', 'description', 'Thriving coral ecosystems and marine biodiversity'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Remote Location', 'description', 'Exclusive destination with fewer tourists'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Authentic Culture', 'description', 'Local islands with traditional Maldivian life')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Haa Alifu Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Northernmost Atoll', 'description', 'Remote location with pristine natural beauty'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Authentic Culture', 'description', 'Strong local traditions and island communities'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Pristine Reefs', 'description', 'Untouched coral ecosystems with excellent biodiversity'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Exclusive Destination', 'description', 'Few tourists and exclusive experiences')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Haa Dhaalu Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Remote Location', 'description', 'Pristine coral reefs and authentic culture'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Luxury Without Crowds', 'description', 'Exclusive resorts with fewer tourists'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Authentic Experiences', 'description', 'Strong local traditions and island communities'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Pristine Marine Life', 'description', 'Excellent diving and snorkeling opportunities')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Dhaalu Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Budget-Friendly', 'description', 'Excellent value for money'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Authentic Culture', 'description', 'Strong local traditions and island communities'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Local Island Experiences', 'description', 'Traditional architecture and fishing harbors'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Natural Beauty', 'description', 'Pristine beaches and healthy coral reefs')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Faafu Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Pristine Diving', 'description', 'Excellent dive sites with healthy coral reefs'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Authentic Culture', 'description', 'Local islands with traditional Maldivian life'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Value for Money', 'description', 'Good quality experiences at reasonable prices'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Marine Biodiversity', 'description', 'Abundant fish species and marine life')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Vaavu Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Pristine Diving', 'description', 'Excellent dive sites with minimal crowds'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Remote Location', 'description', 'Exclusive destination with few tourists'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Healthy Reefs', 'description', 'Thriving coral ecosystems with excellent biodiversity'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Authentic Experiences', 'description', 'Mix of luxury and local island culture')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Thaa Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Remote Location', 'description', 'Pristine diving and snorkeling'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Authentic Culture', 'description', 'Strong local traditions and island communities'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Value for Money', 'description', 'Excellent experiences at reasonable prices'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Marine Biodiversity', 'description', 'Abundant fish species and marine life')
    )
    ELSE highlights
  END,
  activities = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Raa Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Diving', 'description', 'World-class dive sites with manta rays and pelagics', 'emoji', '🤿'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Snorkeling', 'description', 'Excellent house reef snorkeling', 'emoji', '🤽'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Fishing', 'description', 'Traditional and sport fishing opportunities', 'emoji', '🎣'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Local Culture', 'description', 'Visit inhabited islands and experience local life', 'emoji', '🏝️'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Water Sports', 'description', 'Kayaking and paddleboarding', 'emoji', '🚣')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Lhaviyani Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Snorkeling', 'description', 'Excellent house reef snorkeling with vibrant marine life', 'emoji', '🤽'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Diving', 'description', 'Diverse dive sites from house reefs to channels', 'emoji', '🤿'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Beach Relaxation', 'description', 'Pristine beaches and water activities', 'emoji', '🏖️'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Romantic Experiences', 'description', 'Perfect for couples and honeymooners', 'emoji', '💑'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Island Hopping', 'description', 'Visit multiple islands and local communities', 'emoji', '🏝️')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Noonu Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Diving', 'description', 'Exciting drift dives and wall diving', 'emoji', '🤿'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Snorkeling', 'description', 'Excellent snorkeling opportunities', 'emoji', '🤽'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Shark Watching', 'description', 'Regular encounters with reef and pelagic sharks', 'emoji', '🦈'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Photography', 'description', 'Macro and wide-angle photography opportunities', 'emoji', '📸'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Fishing', 'description', 'Sport and traditional fishing', 'emoji', '🎣')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Shaviyani Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Diving', 'description', 'Pristine dive sites with excellent visibility', 'emoji', '🤿'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Snorkeling', 'description', 'House reef snorkeling with vibrant marine life', 'emoji', '🤽'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Local Culture', 'description', 'Visit inhabited islands and experience local traditions', 'emoji', '🏝️'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Beach Relaxation', 'description', 'Pristine beaches and water activities', 'emoji', '🏖️'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Photography', 'description', 'Excellent opportunities for underwater photography', 'emoji', '📸')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Haa Alifu Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Diving', 'description', 'Pristine dive sites with excellent marine life', 'emoji', '🤿'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Snorkeling', 'description', 'Excellent house reef snorkeling', 'emoji', '🤽'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Local Culture', 'description', 'Visit local islands and experience authentic Maldivian life', 'emoji', '🏝️'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Island Hopping', 'description', 'Explore multiple inhabited islands', 'emoji', '🛥️'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Photography', 'description', 'Pristine natural environments and cultural photography', 'emoji', '📸')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Haa Dhaalu Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Diving', 'description', 'Pristine dive sites with excellent visibility and marine life', 'emoji', '🤿'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Snorkeling', 'description', 'Excellent house reef snorkeling', 'emoji', '🤽'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Local Culture', 'description', 'Experience authentic Maldivian island life', 'emoji', '🏝️'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Fishing', 'description', 'Traditional and sport fishing opportunities', 'emoji', '🎣'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Beach Relaxation', 'description', 'Pristine beaches and peaceful environments', 'emoji', '🏖️')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Dhaalu Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Snorkeling', 'description', 'Excellent snorkeling from local islands', 'emoji', '🤽'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Diving', 'description', 'Good dive sites with reasonable prices', 'emoji', '🤿'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Local Culture', 'description', 'Visit inhabited islands and experience local life', 'emoji', '🏝️'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Fishing', 'description', 'Traditional fishing experiences', 'emoji', '🎣'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Beach Relaxation', 'description', 'Pristine beaches and peaceful environments', 'emoji', '🏖️')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Faafu Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Diving', 'description', 'Pristine dive sites with excellent visibility', 'emoji', '🤿'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Snorkeling', 'description', 'Excellent house reef snorkeling', 'emoji', '🤽'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Local Culture', 'description', 'Visit inhabited islands and experience local traditions', 'emoji', '🏝️'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Fishing', 'description', 'Traditional and sport fishing opportunities', 'emoji', '🎣'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Island Hopping', 'description', 'Explore multiple islands and communities', 'emoji', '🛥️')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Vaavu Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Diving', 'description', 'Pristine dive sites with excellent visibility', 'emoji', '🤿'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Snorkeling', 'description', 'Excellent snorkeling opportunities', 'emoji', '🤽'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Local Culture', 'description', 'Visit inhabited islands and experience local life', 'emoji', '🏝️'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Beach Relaxation', 'description', 'Pristine beaches and peaceful environments', 'emoji', '🏖️'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Photography', 'description', 'Excellent opportunities for underwater and landscape photography', 'emoji', '📸')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Thaa Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Diving', 'description', 'Pristine dive sites with excellent visibility', 'emoji', '🤿'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Snorkeling', 'description', 'Excellent snorkeling opportunities', 'emoji', '🤽'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Local Culture', 'description', 'Visit inhabited islands and experience local traditions', 'emoji', '🏝️'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Fishing', 'description', 'Traditional and sport fishing opportunities', 'emoji', '🎣'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Island Hopping', 'description', 'Explore multiple islands and communities', 'emoji', '🛥️')
    )
    ELSE activities
  END,
  accommodation = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Raa Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Luxury Resorts', 'description', 'Premium overwater villas with world-class amenities', 'priceRange', '$800-$3500 per night'),
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Mid-Range Resorts', 'description', 'Comfortable resorts with good facilities', 'priceRange', '$300-$1000 per night'),
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Local Guesthouses', 'description', 'Budget-friendly options on local islands', 'priceRange', '$40-$100 per night')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Lhaviyani Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Luxury Resorts', 'description', 'Premium overwater villas and beach bungalows', 'priceRange', '$700-$3000 per night'),
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Mid-Range Resorts', 'description', 'Comfortable resorts with good service', 'priceRange', '$250-$800 per night'),
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Local Guesthouses', 'description', 'Budget options on local islands', 'priceRange', '$35-$80 per night')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Noonu Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Luxury Resorts', 'description', 'Premium overwater villas with world-class service', 'priceRange', '$900-$4000 per night'),
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Mid-Range Resorts', 'description', 'Comfortable resorts with good amenities', 'priceRange', '$350-$1200 per night'),
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Local Guesthouses', 'description', 'Budget options on local islands', 'priceRange', '$45-$120 per night')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Shaviyani Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Luxury Resorts', 'description', 'Premium resorts with overwater villas', 'priceRange', '$600-$2500 per night'),
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Mid-Range Resorts', 'description', 'Comfortable resorts with good facilities', 'priceRange', '$250-$800 per night'),
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Local Guesthouses', 'description', 'Budget-friendly options on local islands', 'priceRange', '$30-$70 per night')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Haa Alifu Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Luxury Resorts', 'description', 'Premium resorts with exclusive amenities', 'priceRange', '$700-$3000 per night'),
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Mid-Range Resorts', 'description', 'Comfortable resorts with good service', 'priceRange', '$250-$900 per night'),
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Local Guesthouses', 'description', 'Budget options on local islands', 'priceRange', '$25-$60 per night')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Haa Dhaalu Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Luxury Resorts', 'description', 'Premium resorts with exclusive amenities', 'priceRange', '$650-$2800 per night'),
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Mid-Range Resorts', 'description', 'Comfortable resorts with good facilities', 'priceRange', '$200-$700 per night'),
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Local Guesthouses', 'description', 'Budget options on local islands', 'priceRange', '$20-$50 per night')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Dhaalu Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Local Guesthouses', 'description', 'Budget-friendly options', 'priceRange', '$25-$45 per night'),
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Mid-Range Resorts', 'description', 'Comfortable resorts with good amenities', 'priceRange', '$150-$400 per night'),
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Luxury Resorts', 'description', 'Premium options', 'priceRange', '$400-$1500 per night')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Faafu Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Local Guesthouses', 'description', 'Budget options', 'priceRange', '$20-$40 per night'),
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Mid-Range Resorts', 'description', 'Comfortable resorts', 'priceRange', '$150-$500 per night'),
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Luxury Resorts', 'description', 'Premium options', 'priceRange', '$500-$2000 per night')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Vaavu Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Luxury Resorts', 'description', 'Premium resorts with exclusive amenities', 'priceRange', '$600-$2500 per night'),
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Mid-Range Resorts', 'description', 'Comfortable resorts', 'priceRange', '$200-$700 per night'),
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Local Guesthouses', 'description', 'Budget options on local islands', 'priceRange', '$25-$60 per night')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Thaa Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Local Guesthouses', 'description', 'Budget options', 'priceRange', '$20-$40 per night'),
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Mid-Range Resorts', 'description', 'Comfortable resorts', 'priceRange', '$150-$500 per night'),
      JSON_OBJECT('type', 'Luxury Resorts', 'description', 'Premium options', 'priceRange', '$400-$1800 per night')
    )
    ELSE accommodation
  END,
  transportation = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Raa Atoll' THEN '45-60 minutes by speedboat or 25-30 minutes by seaplane from Malé'
    WHEN name = 'Lhaviyani Atoll' THEN '40-50 minutes by speedboat or 20-25 minutes by seaplane from Malé'
    WHEN name = 'Noonu Atoll' THEN '50-70 minutes by speedboat or 30-35 minutes by seaplane from Malé'
    WHEN name = 'Shaviyani Atoll' THEN '60-80 minutes by speedboat or 35-40 minutes by seaplane from Malé'
    WHEN name = 'Haa Alifu Atoll' THEN '90-120 minutes by speedboat or 45-50 minutes by seaplane from Malé'
    WHEN name = 'Haa Dhaalu Atoll' THEN '80-100 minutes by speedboat or 40-45 minutes by seaplane from Malé'
    WHEN name = 'Dhaalu Atoll' THEN '45-60 minutes by speedboat or 25-30 minutes by seaplane from Malé'
    WHEN name = 'Faafu Atoll' THEN '50-70 minutes by speedboat or 30-35 minutes by seaplane from Malé'
    WHEN name = 'Vaavu Atoll' THEN '40-50 minutes by speedboat or 20-25 minutes by seaplane from Malé'
    WHEN name = 'Thaa Atoll' THEN '60-80 minutes by speedboat or 35-40 minutes by seaplane from Malé'
    ELSE transportation
  END,
  bestSeason = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Raa Atoll' THEN 'November to April for best weather; June to November for manta rays'
    WHEN name = 'Lhaviyani Atoll' THEN 'Year-round destination; best weather November to April'
    WHEN name = 'Noonu Atoll' THEN 'November to April for best weather; year-round diving destination'
    WHEN name = 'Shaviyani Atoll' THEN 'November to April for best weather; year-round destination'
    WHEN name = 'Haa Alifu Atoll' THEN 'November to April for best weather; year-round destination'
    WHEN name = 'Haa Dhaalu Atoll' THEN 'November to April for best weather; year-round destination'
    WHEN name = 'Dhaalu Atoll' THEN 'November to April for best weather; year-round destination'
    WHEN name = 'Faafu Atoll' THEN 'November to April for best weather; year-round destination'
    WHEN name = 'Vaavu Atoll' THEN 'November to April for best weather; year-round destination'
    WHEN name = 'Thaa Atoll' THEN 'November to April for best weather; year-round destination'
    ELSE bestSeason
  END
WHERE name IN ('Raa Atoll', 'Lhaviyani Atoll', 'Noonu Atoll', 'Shaviyani Atoll', 'Haa Alifu Atoll', 'Haa Dhaalu Atoll', 'Dhaalu Atoll', 'Faafu Atoll', 'Vaavu Atoll', 'Thaa Atoll');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute UPDATE atolls SET
  overview = CASE 
    WHEN name = 'Raa Atoll' THEN 'Raa Atoll is a pristine diving destination featuring world-class dive sites with abundant marine life including manta rays, pelagics, and sharks. Known for excellent current dives along walls and pinnacles, Raa offers an exclusive experience with fewer tourists than other northern atolls. The atoll combines luxury resorts with authentic local island culture.'
    WHEN name = 'Lhaviyani Atoll' THEN 'Lhaviyani Atoll is renowned for its clear lagoons and calm waters, making it ideal for snorkeling and diving. The atoll is particularly popular with honeymooners seeking pristine beaches and romantic settings. With a mix of luxury resorts and local islands, Lhaviyani offers diverse experiences from adventure to relaxation.'
    WHEN name = 'Noonu Atoll' THEN 'Noonu Atoll offers exciting drift dives along walls and pinnacles with a variety of shark encounters and unique reef and macro species. The atoll is known for its pristine coral ecosystems and abundant marine biodiversity. Home to several luxury resorts and local islands, Noonu provides excellent diving combined with comfortable accommodations.'
    WHEN name = 'Shaviyani Atoll' THEN 'Shaviyani Atoll is a remote northern destination offering pristine diving and snorkeling in less crowded waters. The atoll features healthy coral reefs, abundant marine life, and a mix of luxury resorts and local islands. Known for excellent value and authentic experiences, Shaviyani attracts divers seeking pristine conditions.'
    WHEN name = 'Haa Alifu Atoll' THEN 'Haa Alifu Atoll is the northernmost atoll of the Maldives, located about 350 km north of Malé. This remote destination offers pristine natural beauty, authentic local culture, and excellent diving opportunities. The atoll is known for its untouched coral reefs and abundant marine life, making it ideal for adventurous travelers seeking exclusive experiences.'
    WHEN name = 'Haa Dhaalu Atoll' THEN 'Haa Dhaalu Atoll is a remote destination featuring pristine coral reefs, authentic local culture, and luxury resorts without crowds. The atoll offers excellent diving and snorkeling combined with peaceful island experiences. Known for its unspoiled natural beauty and genuine Maldivian hospitality, Haa Dhaalu is ideal for travelers seeking exclusive, authentic experiences.'
    WHEN name = 'Dhaalu Atoll' THEN 'Dhaalu Atoll provides excellent value tourism with authentic local island experiences and beautiful natural environments. This atoll offers budget travelers the chance to experience true Maldivian culture without resort price tags. Local islands feature traditional architecture, working fishing harbors, and opportunities to learn about sustainable island living.'
    WHEN name = 'Faafu Atoll' THEN 'Faafu Atoll is a remote central destination offering pristine diving and snorkeling combined with authentic local island experiences. The atoll features healthy coral reefs, abundant marine life, and a mix of luxury resorts and budget-friendly local islands. Known for excellent value and genuine Maldivian hospitality, Faafu attracts diverse travelers.'
    WHEN name = 'Vaavu Atoll' THEN 'Vaavu Atoll is a small, remote atoll offering pristine diving and snorkeling experiences with fewer tourists. The atoll features excellent dive sites, healthy coral ecosystems, and a mix of luxury resorts and local islands. Known for its untouched natural beauty and exclusive experiences, Vaavu is ideal for divers seeking pristine conditions.'
    WHEN name = 'Thaa Atoll' THEN 'Thaa Atoll is a remote southern destination offering pristine diving and authentic local island experiences. The atoll features healthy coral reefs, abundant marine life, and a mix of luxury resorts and budget-friendly local islands. Known for excellent value and genuine Maldivian hospitality, Thaa attracts adventurous travelers seeking exclusive experiences.'
    ELSE overview
  END,
  highlights = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Raa Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Manta Ray Hotspot', 'description', 'Seasonal aggregations of manta rays at cleaning stations'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Pristine Dive Sites', 'description', 'Thilas, channels, and walls with excellent visibility'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Exclusive Destination', 'description', 'Less crowded than other northern atolls'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Local Island Culture', 'description', 'Authentic Maldivian experiences on local islands')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Lhaviyani Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Clear Lagoons', 'description', 'Calm, transparent waters perfect for snorkeling'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Honeymooner Paradise', 'description', 'Romantic settings and luxury resorts'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Diverse Diving', 'description', 'Varied dive sites suitable for all levels'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Local Islands', 'description', 'Authentic cultural experiences')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Noonu Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Drift Diving', 'description', 'Exciting current dives along walls and pinnacles'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Shark Encounters', 'description', 'Regular sightings of reef sharks and pelagics'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Pristine Reefs', 'description', 'Healthy coral ecosystems with exceptional biodiversity'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Luxury Resorts', 'description', 'World-class accommodation options')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Shaviyani Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Pristine Diving', 'description', 'Less crowded dive sites with excellent conditions'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Healthy Reefs', 'description', 'Thriving coral ecosystems and marine biodiversity'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Remote Location', 'description', 'Exclusive destination with fewer tourists'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Authentic Culture', 'description', 'Local islands with traditional Maldivian life')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Haa Alifu Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Northernmost Atoll', 'description', 'Remote location with pristine natural beauty'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Authentic Culture', 'description', 'Strong local traditions and island communities'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Pristine Reefs', 'description', 'Untouched coral ecosystems with excellent biodiversity'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Exclusive Destination', 'description', 'Few tourists and exclusive experiences')
    )
    WHEN name = 'Haa Dhaalu Atoll' THEN JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Remote Location', 'description', 'Pristine coral reefs and authentic culture'),
      JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Luxury Without Crowds', 'description', 'Exclusive resorts with fewer tourists'),

  transportation = CASE

    WHEN name = 'Lhaviyani Atoll' THEN '40-50 minutes by speedboat or 20-25 minutes by seaplane from Malé'
    WHEN name = 'Noonu Atoll' THEN '50-70 minutes by speedboat or 30-35 minutes by seaplane from Malé'

    WHEN name = 'Haa Dhaalu Atoll' THEN '80-100 minutes by speedboat or 40-45 minutes by seaplane from Malé'
    WHEN name = 'Dhaalu Atoll' THEN '45-60 minutes by speedboat or 25-30 minutes by seaplane from Malé'

    WHEN name = 'Thaa Atoll' THEN '60-80 minutes by speedboat or 35-40 minutes by seaplane from Malé'
    ELSE transportation

    WHEN name = 'Raa Atoll' THEN 'November to April for best weather; June to November for manta rays'

    WHEN name = 'Noonu Atoll' THEN 'November to April for best weather; year-round diving destination'

    WHEN name = 'Vaavu Atoll' THEN 'November to April for best weather; year-round destination'
    WHEN name = 'Thaa Atoll' THEN 'November to April for best weather; year-round destination'
    ELSE bestSeason
